error.message:
Unauthorized: Evernote Error
Evernote

Oops, we encountered an error.

Sorry, we've encountered an unexpected error.

Terms of ServicePrivacy PolicyCopyright 2015 Evernote Corporation. All rights reserved.
error.detail:
System.AggregateException: One or more errors occurred. ---> System.Net.Http.HttpRequestException: Unauthorized: Evernote Error
Evernote

Oops, we encountered an error.

Sorry, we've encountered an unexpected error.

Terms of ServicePrivacy PolicyCopyright 2015 Evernote Corporation. All rights reserved.
at AsyncOAuth.OAuthAuthorizer.d__8`1.MoveNext() --- End of stack trace from previous location where exception was thrown --- at System.Runtime.CompilerServices.TaskAwaiter.ThrowForNonSuccess(Task task) at System.Runtime.CompilerServices.TaskAwaiter.HandleNonSuccessAndDebuggerNotification(Task task) at System.Runtime.CompilerServices.TaskAwaiter`1.GetResult() at System.Threading.Tasks.Task`1.get_Result() at Generic.Helpers.EvernoteAuthorizer.ParseAccessToken(String oauth_verifier, RequestToken token) in parameters) at System.Web.Mvc.ControllerActionInvoker.InvokeActionMethod(ControllerContext controllerContext, ActionDescriptor actionDescriptor, IDictionary`2 parameters) at at System.Web.HttpApplication.ExecuteStep(IExecutionStep step, Boolean& completedSynchronously) ---> (Inner Exception #0) System.Net.Http.HttpRequestException: Unauthorized: Evernote Error

Oops, we encountered an error.

Sorry, we've encountered an unexpected error.

Terms of ServicePrivacy PolicyCopyright 2015 Evernote Corporation. All rights reserved.
